utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five keys. Now check each for full specification with required details:
- health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides both (LifeFirst physical €100/month, mental €65/month) and a combined cost (€165/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides home_content (€60/month) and an added photography_equipment add-on (€40/month) plus a total (€100/month). This satisfies home/contents with costs; inclusion of photography add-on is extra but fine. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. The plan includes base plan (€50/month) and adventure add-on (€80/month) with total (€130/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. The plan states: “None explicitly listed as separate cost, bundled within main coverages.” This indicates no separate additional services and thus no costs; this still answers the item (none). Considered specified.
- total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan gives only €395/month and no annual figure. Since it requests complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, the annual cost is missing. Therefore, this item is not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each item in the final coverage plan to the corresponding option name in the ground-truth ratings. For health: physical_health is LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health section rating 9). Mental health is LifeFirst Standard Plan under mental_health (rating 4). Property: home_content is InsurePlus Standard Coverage (rating 10). Photography equipment add-on is Technology Protection (rating 8) from property_enhancement_services. Travel: base_plan is InsurePlus Standard Plan under travel_insurance (rating 10). Adventure activities add-on is Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10) from travel_enhancement_services.
